scenes.title: The Castle Bridge
scenes.background_prompt: A medieval stone bridge over a murky moat, with a castle tower and battlement in the background, a flag on a pole, and lily pads floating in the moat. Overcast sky. No people, no animals.
scenes.full_scene_prompt: A medieval scene on an overcast day. A knight in polished silver armor with a red plume on the helmet stands firmly on a stone bridge that arches over a murky green moat. The knight's feet are planted solidly on the bridge stones, one hand resting on the pommel of a sheathed sword. Behind the knight, a tall castle tower rises with gray stone battlements, and a red flag with a golden lion emblem waves from a pole at the top. In the moat below the bridge, green lily pads float on the still water, and a bright green frog with bulging eyes sits on one of the larger lily pads, its throat slightly puffed. Ivy grows up the sides of the bridge's stone railings. The water is dark and reflects the gray sky above.
scenes.composition_instructions: Place knight on the stone bridge, standing firmly with feet planted solidly on the bridge stones, one hand on sword pommel. Place frog on one of the larger lily pads in the moat below, sitting with throat slightly puffed.
scenes.scene_description: In the lower-left foreground, there are dark green bushes with clover-shaped leaves situated next to a grassy field dotted with small white, yellow, and purple flowers. A cobblestone path made of irregular grey and tan stones leads from the left edge toward the center of the scene. Behind the path and field are several large, rounded trees with dense foliage in shades of green, yellow, and orange. In the middle foreground, a stone bridge with three arches spans a body of water; the bridge is constructed from irregular grey and brown stones with green ivy trailing down its sides. Underneath the bridge, the water is a murky green color, dotted with green lily pads and brown cattails. A green frog with a light-colored belly sits on a lily pad in the lower-right foreground, facing toward the left. On top of the bridge stands a knight in full silver plate armor. The knight has a red plume on his helmet, a green cape with a yellow lining draped over his shoulders, and a brown scabbard hanging from his waist. He holds a blue shield featuring a yellow lion emblem in his left hand. To the right of the bridge is a stone castle featuring a round tower with crenelated battlements and a small arched window. Atop the tower, a red flag with a yellow lion emblem flies from a brown flagpole. To the right of the tower is a stone wall containing an arched wooden door. The entire scene is set under a pale blue sky filled with large, soft, white and light grey clouds, suggesting a clear, bright day.

CH: knight in full silver plate armor
green frog with a light-colored belly
S: murky green water with lily pads
pale blue sky with soft clouds
IE: the knight reaches the stone bridge
the frog spots the armored knight
IR: the knight feels brave and ready
the frog feels curious about the visitor
P: the knight intends to guard the castle
the frog wants to stay on its lily pad
A: the knight stands tall on the bridge
the frog sits quietly in the water
CO: the castle remains safe and secure
the frog watches the knight from below

ENP: shiny silver armor with a red plume
blue shield with a yellow lion emblem
green cape with a yellow lining
old stone bridge with trailing ivy
SC: while the knight stands on the bridge
because he is guarding the castle gate
as the frog sits on the lily pad
